Package index

All functions

calc_backstep()
Calculate pressure and flow profile along a lateral line (Backstep procedure)
calc_head_loss()
Calculate head loss in pipes by different methods
calc_kc_curve()
Generate Crop Coefficient (Kc) Curve
calc_water_balance()
Calculate Daily Soil Water Balance
get_brdwgd_weather()
Extract Point Data from BR-DWGD
